status: PHASE 24 COMPLETE — EMBED BLOCKER FIXED, OUTREACH READY

section_1_outreach_failure_postmortem.summary: Audited all 20 May 14 outreach emails. Root cause: 12/20 targets were WRONG (competitors, calculator platforms, major brands). 20/20 had zero personalization. 20/20 used generic subjects. Result: 0 replies, 0 backlinks.
top_failure_reasons: Wrong targets (12/20 — sent to calculator platforms, competitors, massive brands)
Zero personalization (20/20 — automated template with no article reference)
Weak/generic subjects (20/20 — 'Free X for your readers')
Offer mismatch (13/20 — compound interest widget sent to mortgage/debt sites)

offers: A: Mortgage Widget Embed — for mortgage/real estate blogs
B: Debt Payoff Widget Embed — for debt/credit/budgeting blogs
C: Custom Calculation Example — for any article with calculations
D: Broken/Outdated Resource Replacement — for resource pages
E: Mini Data/Comparison Table — for newsletters/comparison articles
section_2_v2_offer_stack.philosophy: Every offer makes a publisher say 'This helps my readers.' No backlink ask in first message.

templates: Widget Embed Offer — 4 sentences, specific article reference, reader-focused
Custom Calculation Example Offer — 4 sentences, 'same math, but personalized'
Resource Replacement Offer — 4 sentences, broken-link hook
section_3_pitch_templates.rules: Max 3-5 sentences. No backlink ask. No SEO language. Specific article reference. Easy yes/no CTA.

section_4_small_prospects.excluded: All DR 75+ sites, calculator platforms, major fintech, competitors

section_5_jun13_followup_plan.notable: 4 are corrected offers (mortgage widget for mortgage sites, debt widget for debt sites). 4 are short check-ins on batch 2 personalized emails.
section_5_jun13_followup_plan.do_not_follow_up: All competitors, calculator platforms, major brands, wrong contacts

prospects: First Time Home Buyer Guide (mortgage widget)
section_6_test_emails.blocked_by: NONE — embed blocker fixed, ready to send

section_7_linkable_asset_readiness.mortgage_widget: READY — page loads, widget works, embed code NOW WORKS (x-frame-options fixed)
section_7_linkable_asset_readiness.debt_widget: READY — page loads, widget works, embed code NOW WORKS (x-frame-options fixed)
section_7_linkable_asset_readiness.fix_details: Removed global X-Frame-Options: DENY from vercel.json. Added CSP: frame-ancestors * on /embed/*, /widgets/embed/*, /api/widget/*, /calculators/*/embed routes. Verified working on all 3 embed paths.

golden_rules: NEVER ask for specific anchor text
NEVER mention SEO, backlinks, or link building

section_9_measurement_rules.failure_rule: If 0/20 V2 replies, pivot to journalist/source-response and partnership directories

current_status.embed_blocker: FIXED — all embed routes now allow iframe framing

next_actions: Send 5 V2 test emails (embed blocker fixed — ready)
Research contact methods for top 10 priority prospects
Do NOT send 30 emails at once — batch of 5 first, learn, then scale
on_track_off_track: TRANSITIONING TO ON_TRACK — embed blocker was the critical gate. Outreach system redesigned from failure postmortem.
